input_text: Guidance for safe transportation of blood components
NL_requirements: The system must continuously monitor environmental conditions during transportation.
A risk assessment must be performed to consider the impact of transportation variables.
Red cell components must never reach temperatures below 1°C or above 10°C.
A single interruption of platelet agitation must not exceed 8 hours (28,800 seconds).
Total interruption of platelet agitation must not exceed 24 hours (86,400 seconds).
Granulocyte preparations must not be transported for longer than 24 hours (86,400 seconds).
If a deviation occurs, the system must ensure that the deviation is approved.
A competent person must execute the approval of a deviation.
Upon receiving the component, the system must ensure it is transferred to storage.
After placing the thermometer between bags, the temperature must be read after a minimum delay of 300 seconds.
